title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: maven bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for maven is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Maven is a software project management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model (POM), Maven can manage a project's build, reporting and documentation from a central piece of information.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): sub-package maven-openjdk25 (JIRA:RHEL-96002)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for maven is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Maven is a software project management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model (POM), Maven can manage a project's build, reporting and documentation from a central piece of information.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): sub-package maven-openjdk25 (JIRA:RHEL-96002)
